quarantined.reason: Known unstable scheduler timing assertions; keep out of default server gate until fixed.
quarantined.exitCriteria: Replace timing-sensitive assertions with deterministic scheduler controls and prove the test passes in check:server for five consecutive local/CI runs.

quarantined.reason: Live provider coverage belongs in maintainer baseline or release mode, not the default PR gate.
quarantined.exitCriteria: Move live behavior into provider-smoke lanes and keep only non-live provider contract tests in check:server.

quarantined.reason: Known default-gate instability; keep quarantined until task timing is hardened.
quarantined.exitCriteria: Harden task timing with fake timers or event-based waits and prove the suite passes in check:server for five consecutive local/CI runs.

quarantined.reason: Broad e2e flow is not deterministic enough for default PR checks.
quarantined.exitCriteria: Split into deterministic contract tests or move to an explicit smoke lane with bounded fixtures, logs, and timeout policy.
